horizontalContentAlignment.description: Horizontal alignment applied to the Card's header and content stack.

margin.description: Outer spacing around the Card, using WPF Thickness syntax.

maxWidth.description: Maximum rendered width of the Card in device-independent pixels.

minHeight.description: Minimum rendered height of the Card in device-independent pixels.

padding.description: Inner spacing around the Card's header and content, using WPF Thickness syntax.

verticalContentAlignment.description: Vertical alignment applied to the Card's header and content stack.

actions.description: Action buttons rendered horizontally in the Card footer.

content.description: Primary Card body rendered after the optional header.

header.description: Optional heading content rendered before the Card body.
